unlocks.name: Lama
unlocks.description: Survive 20 minutes with at least +10% Curse.
notes: The actual unlock condition is to have any amount of Curse higher than the base value at the end of a 20+ minute run.

unlocks.name: EXTRA: Gazebo
notes: Used to be unlocked by evolving Gaze of Gaea into Embrace of Gaea.

unlocks.name: KissMe
unlocks.description: Follow the trail after pillaging Pummarola and Skull O'Maniac from the Mad Forest.

unlocks.name: MaFaiPianooo
unlocks.description: It is tangible only in the inverted Inlaid Library. Good friends might then show the way.

unlocks.name: CheeseAccident
unlocks.description: Deal with the consequence of stealing cheese from the Dairy Plant.

unlocks.name: BringMeBackThere
unlocks.description: Investigate the bottom of Gallo Tower.

unlocks.name: PureHeart
unlocks.description: With a pure heart and two good friends, visit the fiery balcony in Cappella Magna.

unlocks.name: BeAGoodBoy
unlocks.description: Be a good boy in Il Molise.

unlocks.name: Master16
unlocks.description: Run away from Moongolow with all 16 accessories mastered.

unlocks.name: EdgeOfTheWorld
unlocks.description: With the most adverse fate in Green Acres, run off the edge of the world.

unlocks.name: SlumsFlowers
unlocks.description: Find the only one place where flowers bloom in The Bone Zone.

unlocks.name: BossRashBoss
unlocks.description: Survive the Boss Rash with just one weapon.

unlocks.name: KillThaReapa
unlocks.description: Settle the score with the Reaper.

unlocks.name: SpamSpamSpam
unlocks.description: 3) Sometimes you just need to ask for help.

unlocks.name: GetRingOfRings
unlocks.description: It's as simple as ABC: obtain the ring of rings.

unlocks.name: PrincessShadow
unlocks.description: Her royal shadow lies behind the 46th door.

unlocks.name: WanderingColossus

unlocks.name: HearTheThunder
unlocks.description: Discover the source of the roaring thunder on the Tiny Bridge.

unlocks.name: WinCarloCart
unlocks.description: Forsake victory in favor of sightseeing in Carlo Cart.
